---
agent: Instructions Generator
---
Take an information below and generate an
agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs
directory. If a .md filename is already provided,
use that, otherwise generate an appropriate
filename based on the generated content.
Make sure the instructions are concise, clear, 
and not too long. Make sure to update the 
AGENTS.md file to include a link to the new
instructions file in the appropriate section. If
no information provided below, prompt the 
user to give the necessary details about the
layer of architecture or coding standards to
document.
